title: Create Train
description:
Main about Create and its trains,better player models and the maids,those who like above will definitely want to download it!
WARNING:don't let the Maids drive the Trains(or the other Contraptions), there may be unforeseen problems! BUT NOT ONLY THEAE.
body:
# The New Horizon Update——Create Train [Neo] 8.1.1, welcome to download, play and provide your valuable suggestions!
[Create Train 8.1.1](https://modrinth.com/modpack/create_train/version/8.1.1)
# Do you want to be the first to experience the upcoming Create Train server? Join us now:
[Discord channel](https://discord.gg/74f8smKzjb)

点击链接加入群聊【Create Train玩家交流群】：https://qm.qq.com/q/JgQ4KTXji4
# To download server packs:
[Server packs](https://github.com/HadesScience/Create-Train-Server)
# Introduction 
Main about Create and its trains,guns,optimization,better player models the maids and something others,those who like above will definitely want to download it.
## Optimization 
Use YANG's series,Alex's Mods,Embeddium serious,Oculus,Iris & Oculus Flywheel Compat and other famous mods for optimization,ensures a smooth gaming experience and a colorful worlds.
![Beautiful grasslands and railways](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1dd60ed883765e0e102dbf4b7f80b951e0b15b0b.jpeg)
![The rising sun and a train](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/211d4c0be9ea15173cd4cbf2ed91d459868b5215.jpeg)
### Main mods
First,Create and Create:Steam'n Rails can bring a good train experience to you,and other Create'sauxiliary mods can add icing on the cake to you.
[Create's introduction](https://modrinth.com/mod/create)
[Create: Steam 'n' Rails's introduction](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-steam-n-rails)
![Create oil field(based on Create: Diesel Generators) and cross railway entrance(based on Create: Steam 'n' Rails)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3f0e9d1d5d9b75cece16d7e1d0fb5549b0c54efb.jpeg)
Second,YSM(Yes Steve Model) bring you better player models,and it links with Timeless and Classics Zero(a good guns mod),so you can have a better shooting experience(but balance needs to be adjusted).
[YSM's introduction](https://modrinth.com/mod/yes-steve-model)
[TaCZ's introduction](https://modrinth.com/mod/timeless-and-classics-zero)
![Dis play of compatibility between YSN's model and TaCZ(Timeless and Classics Zero)'s gun](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/312c96af8a59489cdf618c9813f65a898b4c48fe.jpeg)
![YSM's model(Furina) in the railway carriage](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/95531f0a8ee47f15c931278554129930790215d3.jpeg)
Third,Touhou Little Maid,a maids mod(but I think it is a industry mod,because the maids can do many things for automation). WARNING:don't let the Maids drive the Trains(or the other Contraptions), there may be unforeseen problems!
### Thank you for reading,downloading and playing!
